uiLab.title: UI Lab
uiLab.subtitle: Custom components from @fluxp/ui — click cards to see live demos

virtualList.name: Virtual Scroll List
virtualList.description: Efficiently render 10,000+ items — only visible DOM nodes are rendered
virtualList.demoHint: Rendering 10,000 items — only ~20 DOM nodes are actually rendered

dynamicForm.name: Dynamic Form
dynamicForm.description: JSON Schema-driven dynamic form — config-based field generation with built-in validation
dynamicForm.demoHint: This form is driven by JSON Schema, supporting multiple field types and validation rules

schedule.name: Schedule Selector
schedule.description: 7×24 hour time-slot picker for ad delivery, cron tasks, etc. Supports mouse drag to batch-select
schedule.demoHint: Drag to select time slots, drag again to deselect

regionTree.name: Region Selector
regionTree.description: Two-level province/city tree with full-select province, indeterminate state, and selected list management
regionTree.demoHint: Expand provinces and select province/city. Remove selections from the right panel.

chinaDivisionTree.name: China Division Tree
chinaDivisionTree.description: Browse full province-city-area-town data from province-city-china data.min.json (search + expand)
chinaDivisionTree.demoHint: Virtual rendering by default. Search by name and expand nodes to navigate the hierarchy.

form.emailError: Please enter a valid email address
form.agreeError: You must agree to the terms

devtools.title: DevTools
devtools.waitingLogs: Waiting for log data... Click around, switch routes to see logs
